destinations.name: Paris, France
destinations.description: The City of Light is famous for the Eiffel Tower, world-class art, and delicious croissants
destinations.notes: I want to see the Louvre museum and climb the Eiffel Tower at sunset
tips: Book Louvre tickets online to skip lines
Try a real croissant from a local bakery
Take a boat cruise on the Seine at night

destinations.name: Tokyo, Japan
destinations.description: A futuristic city with amazing technology, sushi, and ancient temples
destinations.notes: Must visit Shibuya crossing and try authentic ramen
tips: Get a Suica card for trains
Visit temples early to avoid crowds
Try sushi at the fish market

destinations.name: Bali, Indonesia
destinations.description: Tropical paradise with beautiful beaches, rice terraces, and spiritual temples
destinations.notes: Want to see the monkey forest and relax on the beach

destinations.name: New York City, USA
destinations.description: The Big Apple - famous for Times Square, Central Park, and Broadway shows
destinations.notes: Want to see a Broadway show and eat a real New York pizza
tips: Buy a MetroCard for unlimited subway rides
Visit Central Park on a weekday when it's less crowded
Get Broadway tickets at TKTS for discounts

destinations.name: Rome, Italy
destinations.description: The Eternal City with ancient history, amazing pasta, and the Colosseum
destinations.notes: Must see the Vatican and throw a coin in the Trevi Fountain
tips: Visit the Vatican Museum early morning
Eat pasta where locals eat, not near tourist spots

destinations.name: Cape Town, South Africa
destinations.description: Beautiful city with Table Mountain, penguins at the beach, and amazing vineyards
destinations.notes: Want to hike Table Mountain and see the penguins
tips: Take the cable car up Table Mountain
